name: coapply
description: CoApply — your partner for the jobs you actually want. Turns a job posting into a complete, voice-matched, fit-gated application package: research → fit-score → human checkpoint → cover letter, tailored resume guidance, outreach, interview prep. It drafts, you decide, you send — never auto-submits.

profile_dir.title: Profile folder
profile_dir.description: Folder holding your CoApply profile (identity.md, skills-experience.md, voice-profile.md, positioning-modes.md, resumes/, optional principles.md, and your playbooks/, examples/, facts.md). Application output is written to a 'runs' subfolder inside it.
